what_went_well: All 13 tasks implemented and marked [x] in tasks.md
TypeScript build passes with zero errors
All 500 tests pass (31 test files, 6 new test files added)
Sidebar chat integrates cleanly with existing App.tsx patterns
Session persistence uses real tmpdir in integration tests per CONVENTIONS.md
Deprecation notice includes full migration guidance to sidebar chat
supervisor.md behavioral contract already existed with correct content
what_went_wrong: One test initially failed (parseCancelRequest regex too strict for 'watching' vs 'watch') — fixed immediately
improvement_suggestions: The chat agent executeChatTurn uses execSync which blocks the TUI — a future improvement would use async execution with a proper queue
The sidebar input handling in App.tsx captures all keystrokes when focused — Tab key for QA view is now intercepted; may need refinement
The context token estimation (4 chars/token) is a rough approximation — could use a proper tokenizer for accuracy
deviations_from_spec: supervisor.md already existed with correct content — no changes needed (task 3.3 was pre-done)
The SidebarChat component renders in the same Box layout as main content rather than as a true overlay — this is the correct approach for Ink/TUI
Chat agent execution is synchronous (setTimeout 0) rather than truly async — acceptable for TUI context where blocking is brief
